detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=4e-9. Effect: OR/Beta=0.009244391 [0.0062-0.0123] unit decrease. Initial sample: at least 60,620 European ancestry cases, at least 970,216 European ancestry controls (MTAG boosted by 455,258  Alzheimer's disease samples). Replication sample: NA.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.

title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs1800111 CC genotype (two copies of the CFTR L997F variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicates use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of L997F. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
riskSummary: CFTR variant associated with efficacy for ivacaftor
detail: Patients with the rs1800111 CC genotype (two copies of the CFTR L997F variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicates use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of L997F.
